## LibraryRuntime.IMaterializedLibraryParams.onConversionError property

Error handling behavior for conversion failures during iteration. Defaults to `'warn'` for chocolate libraries.

**Signature:**

```typescript
onConversionError?: Collections.ConversionErrorHandling;
```
